text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Why, if it isn't my dear Shakur! I hear it's your
birthday!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: But I haven't said anything yet?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I already know you've brought along some
dumbass contraption for me to test.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I've told you plenty of times already, but I don't
have any interest in being your guinea pig.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
How regrettable. And after I came all this way to
sincerely wish my friend a happy birthday.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The hell? I know you don't have a single sincere
bone in your body.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmm... If that is your stance, then so be it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But at the very least, understand that I prepared
a wonderful present for you from the bottom of
my pure, sincere heart!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Behold, my latest concoction! I call it, "Scroll
Even in Your Dreams!" One sip, and you'll be able
to scroll on your computer while aslee—
